name: Recursive_Moving_Average_Filters

documentation.description:
See the "Controlling Runtime Checks" section of README.md regarding whether
to disable preconditions. In general you should not disable precondition
checks at runtime (if present).

simple_types.name: RMA_Filter
simple_types.code: type RMA_Filter (Window_Size : Filter_Window_Size) is limited private;

subtypes.name: Filter_Window_Size
subtypes.code: subtype Filter_Window_Size is Integer range 1 .. Integer'Last / 2;

subprograms.name: Insert
subprograms.code: procedure Insert (This : in out RMA_Filter;  New_Sample : Sample)

documentation.description: Updates the new average value based on the value of New_Sample
simply returns the average value previously computed by Insert

The type used for the running total of inputs. The intent is that this
type has a larger range than that of type Sample, so that a larger total
can be accommodated.
The type used for the input samples and output averages.
